remarks: Enjoy beach living on one of Compo Beach's most prestigious and sought-after cul de sac locations set among significant multi -million dollar homes and just steps from the water. No flood insurance required in this elevated location. This custom colonial wood shingle home provides a year round lifestyle in a coastal setting! Upon entering the 2 story foyer you immediately experience the open, relaxed beach feeling leading to the LR with an expansive bay window, extensive millwork, FP and French doors leading to a generously proportioned Family room with a stone FP, built-ins and oversized dining area. A wall of French doors leads to a private backyard oasis with heated gunite pool, spacious patio and magnificent gardens with ever changing colors and blooms! The kitchen has white cabinetry, high end stainless steel appliances and oversized island-the perfect place for entertaining and seamlessly leads to the formal DR. There is a screened porch off the kitchen which provides a place to relax with views of the pool and gardens. The spacious primary bedroom suite with FP, double walk-in closet leads into the marble bathroom with deep soaking tub, oversized shower and dual vanities. The 3 additional bedrooms are ensuite with generous closets. There is a library with floor to ceiling bookcases which is a perfect work space. The finished walk-out LL has a stone FP, full bath and has rec/play areas with unlimited uses or the perfect guest suite area. Life at the beach is the best!
